changes.summary: Added allow rule on DC-Edge-A: src 0.0.0.0/0 → dst 10.20.30.0/24 dport 22 tcp
riskReasons: ANY source on an internet-edge firewall
SSH (22) exposed to internet directly
No matching FortiManager policy template — out-of-band edit
changes.diff: + rule 142 "vendor-ssh-temp" any → DMZ-bastion svc-SSH allow log

changes.summary: Set XSS injection signature pack from "block" → "monitor only" on app-portal.example.com
riskReasons: Signature pack downgraded to monitor-only
Production FQDN, no explicit rollback window set
Bypasses standard CR approval

changes.summary: Added BR-MUM-43 to default overlay; SLA target latency 80ms
Disabled push-based factor for service-accounts policy group
changes.diff:
- factor.push.enabled = true
+ factor.push.enabled = false  (service-accounts group only)

changes.summary: Extended JIT checkout window for DBA group from 1h → 8h
riskReasons: Privileged window extended 8×
Affects 14 privileged DBAs
Reduces just-in-time guarantee

changes.summary: Pushed ADOM "DC-Core" policy bundle to 12 managed FortiGates
Permit rule for partner-VPN subnet 198.51.100.0/24 → internal app tier
riskReasons: External partner subnet → internal app tier
Service set includes admin ports (8443, 9000)

changes.summary: Whitelisted file-share domain *.partner.example for HRMS classifier
riskReasons: Wildcard domain whitelist on HRMS classifier
Bypasses outbound-blob inspection for any *.partner.example child

changes.summary: New label "db-prod-staging" — allow JDBC from app-tier
changes.diff:
+ label db-prod-staging
+ rule app-tier → db-prod-staging tcp/1521 allow

changes.summary: Onboarded api-v2.example.com to WAAP — full block mode
Bypassed posture check for VLAN 412 (lab segment) — temp 14d
riskReasons: NAC posture enforcement disabled on a VLAN
No automated expiry — relies on manual revert

changes.summary: Reduced analytics-tier retention from 180d → 90d to free disk
riskReasons: Retention floor below RBI CSF requirement (180d)
Existing 91-180d events pruned on next sweep
Audit evidence packs for May/Apr at risk

changes.summary: Enabled silent decommission for tagged endpoints (lease-end pool)
riskReasons: Silent decommission skips recovery-key escrow verification
Operator must manually confirm escrow before decommission

changes.summary: Reordered rules on DC-Edge-B — allow-all-out promoted above logging deny
riskReasons: Rule reorder promoted a broad allow above a logged deny
Will silently allow outbound flows that were previously flagged
changes.diff:
- order: deny-suspicious-out (id 088) then allow-out-general (id 091)
+ order: allow-out-general (id 091) then deny-suspicious-out (id 088)

changes.summary: URL filtering profile carve-out: allow *.partner-research.example from any SASE node
riskReasons: Wildcard partner domain whitelisted across all SASE nodes
Bypasses URL category-based blocking
No expiry — manual revert dependency

changes.summary: Publish failed: access policy install to GW-DC2-Edge-A errored at 92% validation
riskReasons: Distributed policy install partially failed
GW-DC2-Edge-A on stale ruleset until next install window
cpd daemon log shows policy verification timeout

changes.summary: iRule HTTP_REQUEST rewrite for /api/* → /api/v2/* on app-portal pool
riskReasons: Active iRule edit on a Critical-tier app
Rewrite changes path semantics; downstream WAF tuned on old paths
No canary pool diversion configured
changes.diff:
+ iRule rewrite-api-v2:
+   when HTTP_REQUEST { HTTP::uri [string map {/api/ /api/v2/} [HTTP::uri]] }

changes.summary: Whitelisted partner-clearing subnet 203.0.113.0/24 across scrubber pair
